text: Abu Bakr Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Balawayh told me, Ibrahim ibn Ishaq told us, Mus'ab ibn Abdullah told us, he said: Salman al-Farisi, whose kunya was Abu Abdullah, was loyal to the Messenger of God, may God bless him and grant him peace. The Messenger of God, may God bless him and grant him peace, said: “Salman is one of us, the People of the House.” Translated by: Muhammad Shafiqur-ur-Rchman Mus'ab bin Abdullah says: Hazrat Salman Farsi (may Allah be pleased with him) was nicknamed "Abu Abdullah". His allegiance was to the Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him). The Messenger of Allah (peace and blessings of Allah be upon him) said about him, "Salman is a member of my household." Hadees Number: 6539 / Arabic Hadees Number: 6539
